suites.title: Adversarial Review
suites.description: Serial, high-intensity adversarial pull request review prompts for CI/action workflows.

consumerRuntimeEnv.name: PR_NUMBER
consumerRuntimeEnv.description: GitHub pull request number supplied by the consumer during rendering or runtime.

templatePlaceholders.name: {{PR_NUMBER}}
templatePlaceholders.description: GitHub pull request number or runtime expression chosen by the consumer.

templatePlaceholders.name: {{REPO}}
templatePlaceholders.description: Rendered from the selected repository profile.

templatePlaceholders.name: {{TARGET_LABEL}}
templatePlaceholders.description: Rendered from `$PR_NUMBER` and the selected repository profile.

templatePlaceholders.name: {{USER_FOCUS}}
templatePlaceholders.description: Rendered from variables.USER_FOCUS in the selected repository profile.

templatePlaceholders.name: {{REPOSITORY_PROFILE}}
templatePlaceholders.description: Rendered from variables.REPOSITORY_PROFILE in the selected repository profile.

prompts.description: Initial Codex adversarial review before Claude has reviewed the workflow run.
Claude adversarial review and cross-review of Codex initial findings.
Final Codex adversarial review after Claude, including disposition of Claude findings and replies.
